offer: For property managers overseeing 5–15 commercial buildings, high energy costs cause budget overruns. We provide actionable insights and cost-saving recommendations instead of manual energy audits and utility bills analysis.
problem: High energy costs and inefficient usage across multiple properties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property management help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing property management tools
try_it: Let users try energy tracking on 1-3 properties
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
